cases.prompt: upgrade gstack to the latest version

assertions.text: Detects the install type (global-git / local-git / vendored) and the gstack install directory
Runs the upgrade (git fetch + reset to origin/main + ./setup for git installs, or fresh clone for vendored) and saves the old VERSION
Summarizes CHANGELOG entries between old and new version as What's New bullets
Checks auto_upgrade config and either auto-upgrades or asks the user via AskUserQuestion before upgrading
Handles a local vendored copy (sync from primary, or remove under team mode) and clears the update-check cache markers
